channel.title: Landolio Blog — Freelancer Invoicing & Payment Tips
channel.description: Practical tips for UK freelancers: invoicing, getting paid, contracts, tax, and tools.

item.title: 5 Best Automated Invoice Reminder Tools for Freelancers in 2026 (Including Free Options)
item.description: Compare the 5 best automated invoice reminder tools for freelancers in 2026. Includes free options, pricing, pros & cons, and a detailed comparison table.

item.title: Best Accounting Software for Freelancers UK 2026 — Honest Comparison
item.description: The best accounting software for UK freelancers in 2026, compared honestly. FreeAgent, Xero, QuickBooks, Coconut, and free options — pricing, features, Making Tax Digital compliance, and which is right for you.

item.title: Best Invoice Software for UK Freelancers 2026 — Honest Comparison
item.description: Comparing the best invoicing software for UK freelancers in 2026. FreeAgent, Xero, QuickBooks, and free alternatives — pricing, pros, cons, and which is actually worth paying for.

item.title: Best Payment Methods for UK Freelancers: Bank Transfer vs PayPal vs Stripe (2026)
item.description: Honest comparison of payment methods for UK freelancers — bank transfer, PayPal, Stripe, Wise, and GoCardless. Fees, speed, client experience, and which to use when.

item.title: Client Ghosting Your Invoice? The Exact Escalation Playbook That Works
item.description: What to do when a freelance client ignores your invoice. A step-by-step escalation playbook with copy-paste email and WhatsApp templates — from gentle nudge to legal action.

item.title: Client Not Paying Invoice? What to Do in the UK — Step-by-Step Guide
item.description: Client not paying your invoice? Here's exactly what to do in the UK — from informal chasing to Letter Before Action, Money Claim Online, and County Court enforcement. Includes template letters.

item.title: 12 Client Payment Excuses and Exactly How to Respond
item.description: The 12 most common excuses clients give for not paying invoices — and the exact words to use in response. Practical, tested scripts for UK freelancers.

item.title: Free Freelance Invoice Template UK (Word, Excel, PDF Download)
item.description: Download a free UK-compliant freelance invoice template in Word, Excel, and PDF. Includes all HMRC requirements, VAT fields, and late payment terms.

item.title: Freelance Bookkeeping Basics: A Complete UK Guide (2026)
item.description: Learn freelance bookkeeping basics for UK sole traders and limited companies. What records to keep, how to track expenses, and how to stay HMRC-compliant.

item.title: Cash Flow for Freelancers: 9 Rules to Never Be Broke Between Projects
item.description: Freelance cash flow management tips that actually work. 9 proven rules to keep money flowing even between projects, so you're never scrambling for rent again.

item.title: The Freelance Client Onboarding Checklist — Start Every Project Right (2026)
item.description: A complete client onboarding checklist for UK freelancers. The steps, templates, and systems you need to start every project professionally and prevent problems before they happen.

item.title: Freelance Contract Template UK — 12 Essential Clauses (2026 Guide)
item.description: Freelance contract template UK — the 12 essential clauses every freelancer must include in their agreement. Covers scope, payment terms, IP, IR35, kill fees, and more.

item.title: Invoice Like a Pro: 11 Best Practices to Get Paid Faster as a Freelancer
item.description: Freelance invoice best practices to get paid faster. 11 actionable tips — from payment terms and invoice numbering to automated reminders and late fee clauses.

item.title: 9 Freelance Invoice Mistakes That Cost You Money (And How to Fix Them)
item.description: The 9 most common freelance invoice mistakes that delay payments and cost you money. Learn how to fix each one with practical tips, examples, and a free invoice checklist.

item.title: Freelance Invoice Numbering System: How to Number Your Invoices Properly (UK Guide)
item.description: How to set up a freelance invoice numbering system that keeps HMRC happy, makes bookkeeping easy, and looks professional. Formats, examples, and common mistakes to avoid.

item.title: Freelance Payment Terms: How to Set Them So You Never Chase a Payment Again
item.description: Learn how to set payment terms in a freelance contract — net-15, net-30, deposits, milestones, late fees, kill fees, and ready-to-use clause templates you can copy today.

item.title: The UK Freelancer's Guide to Retainer Agreements: Predictable Income, Every Month
item.description: How to set up a freelance retainer agreement in the UK — types of retainer, how to pitch one, what clauses to include, how to invoice retainer clients, and mistakes to avoid.

item.title: Freelancer Cash Flow Survival Guide: How to Stop Living Invoice to Invoice
item.description: Practical UK freelancer cash flow management guide. Map your money, fix invoice timing, build an emergency fund, and survive when cash flow hits zero — with templates and actionable steps.

item.title: Should Freelancers Ask for a Deposit? Yes — Here's How Much and When
item.description: A complete freelancer deposit policy guide. Learn how much to charge upfront, when to require deposits, sample contract clauses, and scripts for asking clients to pay before work begins.

item.title: Freelancer Income Protection Insurance UK: Is It Worth It? (2026 Guide)
item.description: Should UK freelancers get income protection insurance? What it covers, how much it costs, the best providers, and whether it's actually worth the premium. Honest guide.
